song.title: Only as through a glass
song.lyrics:
[1] Only as through a glass we see Thee now,
Still pressed, Thy people here upon the earth.
Yet, when these mortal frames a glimpse allow,
We fully yield to Thy precious worth.
[2] Daily the cares of life may wear us down,
Or on us sorely may our trials press,
Seeking to rob us of our joy and crown;
Seeking if, somehow, we would love Thee less.
[3] Yet, daily too, Thy grace we taste afresh;
Trials Thyself to us so sweetly yield.
So if it be that it is thus Thou bless,
Our grateful hearts upon the way are sealed.
[4] Lord, every day renew us more and more,
Whether through death or life it seemeth good,
’Till in and through us Thou Thyself may pour;
Lord, we could never love You as we should.
[5] ’Till comes the day the mortal to erase.
That longed-for day we’ll pass from all that’s old.
Then, in that day, we’ll see Thee face to face,
Nought but Thy love, Thy loving Bride enfold.
